The '''Alliance Civilian Battle Award''' was an honor presented by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Alliance High Command/Legends|High Command]] to civilians who assisted in the fight against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace]] and [[Aeron Azzameen]] were among the recipients of this award for their independent actions in acquiring arms for the Rebel Alliance. Ace later gave his medal to [[MK-09/Legends|MK-09]], which the droid wore proudly.

{{Reb-stub}}

*[[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]]
*[[Aeron Azzameen]]
*[[Dunari]]
